## Type

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without warnings
- [ ] New/changed code has unit tests
- [ ] All tests pass (`dotnet test`)
- [ ] Code formatting verified (`dotnet format --verify-no-changes`)
- [ ] No new analyzer warnings
- [ ] API changes are backward compatible (or breaking change is documented)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Sensitive data (keys, passwords) not committed

## AI-specific (if applicable)

- [ ] Prompt changes tested against golden test set
- [ ] No hallucination regressions
- [ ] Source attribution verified
